body:
<rss  version="2">
  <channel>
    <title>USDA - National Agricultural Statistics Service Reports</title>
    <link>https://www.nass.usda.gov/</link>
    <description>National Agricultural Statistics Service provides timely, accurate, and useful statistics in service to U. S. agriculture.</description>
    <language>en-us</language>
    <ttl>30</ttl>
    <image>
      <url>https://www.nass.usda.gov/rss/logo.gif</url>
      <title>USDA - National Agricultural Statistics Service Reports</title>
      <link>https://www.nass.usda.gov/</link>
    </image>
    <copyright>Copyright 2005</copyright>
    <webMaster>nass@nass.usda.gov</webMaster>
    <item>
      <title>Cost of Pollination</title>
      <link>http://www.nass.usda.gov/Publications/Todays_Reports/reports/cospol25.pdf</link>
      <description>Cost per Colony to Pollinate Almonds up 15 Percent from 2024...</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Peanut Prices</title>
      <link>http://www.nass.usda.gov/Publications/Todays_Reports/reports/pnpr0726.pdf</link>
      <description>Peanut Price Highlights. Peanut prices received by farmers for all farmer stock peanuts averaged 24.1 cents per pound for the week ending February 7, up 0.5...</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Farms and Land in Farms</title>
      <link>http://www.nass.usda.gov/Publications/Todays_Reports/reports/fnlo0226.pdf</link>
      <description>The number of farms in the United States for 2025 is estimated at 1,865,000, down 15,000 farms from 2024....</description>
    </item>
  </channel>
</rss>
